TestCase z46Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n2 > 0 && t1.b != nullptr) {
        double* follow_case_b = (double*)malloc(sizeof(double) * t1.n2);
        memcpy(follow_case_b, t1.b, sizeof(double) * t1.n2);
        follow_case.b = follow_case_b;
    }
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n2 < 1
    if (follow_case.n2 < 1 || follow_case.b == nullptr) {
        // No elements to process or null array, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n2; i++) {
        if (follow_case.b[i] < 0) {
            follow_case.b[i] = -follow_case.b[i];
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
